feedback.text: When a product is bought it should be for the consumer to keep. The seller should not be able to take it back. That is of course expected. When it comes to games that have a server component, many of them have been rendered unusable when they stop the server. I dont think this is fair for games that have been sold to consumers, mostly without an expiration date. It is not that they should have their service running indefinitely, rather they should allow the gamers to run the server themselves. I believe this is fair in the digital space. A few games that are now unusable due to server shutdown: - The Crew - Overwatch (2016) - Darkspore - And many others Heres hoping youll take this into consideration!
